title_zh: 新研究展示我们的医疗AI AMIE如何助力健康管理
title_en: New Research Shows How AMIE, Our Medical AI, Could Help Manage Health Conditions
summary_zh: 《自然》杂志发表的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统AMIE在复杂疾病管理方面，与初级保健医生表现相当。
summary_en: Research published in "Nature" demonstrates that our conversational AI system AMIE matches primary care physicians in managing complex diseases.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项研究证明了AMIE的潜力，表明它可以辅助医生在复杂疾病的诊疗中提供支持，从而推动医疗AI的发展。
why_it_matters_en: This research highlights AMIE's potential to support physicians in complex disease management, advancing the role of AI in healthcare.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: New Research Shows How AMIE, Our Medical AI, Could Help Manage Health Conditions. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 利用人工智能辅助医生诊断儿童罕见遗传病
title_en: Using AI to Help Physicians Diagnose Rare Genetic Diseases Affecting Children
summary_zh: 研究人员使用OpenAI推理模型辅助诊断罕见疾病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出18个新诊断。
summary_en: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to aid in diagnosing rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项研究展示了AI在辅助医疗诊断中的潜力，特别是在罕见遗传病领域，能够提升诊断效率和准确率。

title_zh: 超越LoRA：你能超越最流行的微调技术吗？
title_en: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
summary_zh: 本文探讨了除LoRA（低秩适应）之外的微调技术，讨论了可能超越LoRA性能的方法与趋势。
summary_en: This article explores fine-tuning techniques beyond LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation), discussing methods and trends that could potentially outperform LoRA.
why_it_matters_zh: LoRA是当前最为流行且高效的微调方法，了解其局限及替代方案有助于推动模型微调技术的发展。
why_it_matters_en: LoRA is currently the most popular and efficient fine-tuning method; understanding its limitations and alternatives helps advance model fine-tuning techniques.
